title: Test: Add mocking framework
original_text: Added mocking framework with Mockito. Implemented mocks for external dependencies. Added stubs for database operations. Implemented spy for partial mocking. Added mock verification. Result: mocking framework operational.
expected_subject: test(mocking): add mocking framework with Mockito
expected_command: git commit -m "test(mocking): add mocking framework with Mockito"
